mustRead.title: VAIOM: Continuous-Input, Discrete-Output Decoder-Only Financial Sequence Modeling
mustRead.whyItMatters: Financial observations are continuous, heterogeneous, and noisy, whereas decoder-only next-token models are usually built around discrete symbolic inputs. Read it as a research lead for inference systems, with the paper as the ground truth before any downstream commentary.
